description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:boron Docker image with a before_script that runs node --version, npm --version, installs openssh-client if ssh-agent is missing, starts ssh-agent, adds the $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, creates ~/.ssh, disables strict host key checking when inside Docker, and installs rsync if absent. Define three stages (build, test, deploy) and cache the node_modules directory. In the build stage add a build job that runs npm install, caches node_modules, and stores node_modules as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that runs npm run lint. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch, sets a production environment at https://apilab.gitlab.org, uses rsync -r --delete-after --exclude 'data' --quiet ./ $SSH_USER@$DEPLOY_HOST::apilab/ to sync files, then ssh $SSH_USER@$DEPLOY_HOST '. ~/.bashrc && . ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use stable && pm2 restart apilab' to restart the service, and runs on runners tagged docker and shared.
